message:
feat(config): wezterm.lua to frankenterm.toml migration tool (wa-3dfxb.7)

Best-effort converter from Lua dynamic values to TOML format. Static
assignments are serialized directly; dynamic constructs (callbacks,
conditionals, null values, deeply nested tables) are preserved as
[MANUAL] comments for the user to review.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
